reference_frame.description: Queries are evaluated relative to the anchor object's center. Above/below uses image y. Left/right/front/behind use an anchor-centered frame derived from VLM-estimated anchor orientation. Visibility uses a simple bbox/z-order occlusion heuristic.

anchor_orientation.reason: The chair's full frontal view is visible, indicating it faces toward the camera.
